courses.title: Backend Engineering Fundamentals
courses.description: A practical course covering Node.js, API design, testing, and deployment workflows.

courses.title: Advanced API Design
courses.description: Plan advanced REST, RPC, and integration patterns before publishing to learners.

courses.title: UI/UX Fundamentals
courses.description: Learn core product design thinking, interface principles, wireframes, and usability reviews.

courses.title: Brand Strategy
courses.description: Build memorable brands through positioning, messaging systems, and audience research.

courses.title: Advanced Figma
courses.description: Create polished systems, reusable components, and collaboration workflows in Figma.

courses.title: Frontend Engineering Foundations
courses.description: Ship responsive frontend experiences with HTML, CSS, React, and component design.

courses.title: Product Management Essentials
courses.description: Define roadmaps, shape product requirements, and align teams around measurable outcomes.

courses.title: Social Media Strategy
courses.description: Plan campaign calendars, audience messaging, and conversion-focused social content.

courses.title: Data Science Essentials
courses.description: Master Python, statistics, and machine learning. Analyze data, build predictive models, and make data-driven decisions.

course_modules.title: Foundations
course_modules.description: Core platform concepts and setup steps.

course_modules.title: API Contracts
course_modules.description: Refine endpoints, schemas, and governance choices.

course_modules.title: Design Foundations
course_modules.description: Build a strong UX base with research and interface principles.

course_modules.title: Component Systems
course_modules.description: Design scalable components and team workflows.

course_modules.title: Core Frontend Skills
course_modules.description: Move from layout basics to production-ready interfaces.

course_modules.title: Product Discovery
course_modules.description: Shape problems, users, and priorities before delivery.

course_modules.title: Campaign Planning
course_modules.description: Structure a social media plan that supports business goals.

course_modules.title: Python and Data Fundamentals
course_modules.description: Learn Python programming and data manipulation with pandas and numpy.

course_modules.title: Statistical Analysis and Machine Learning
course_modules.description: Master statistics, hypothesis testing, and introductory machine learning algorithms.

course_modules.title: Data Science in Practice
course_modules.description: Apply data science techniques to real-world projects and datasets.

lessons.title: Introduction to the Learning Core
lessons.content: This lesson introduces the Talent Flow BE-2 learning domain.

lessons.title: Designing Course Catalog APIs
lessons.content: This lesson covers catalog and detail endpoint design.

lessons.title: Testing Instructor Flows
lessons.content: This lesson covers grading flows and role-based access.

lessons.title: Choosing the Right API Pattern
lessons.content: Compare REST, GraphQL, webhooks, and async orchestration choices.

lessons.title: Versioning Without Breaking Clients
lessons.content: Use contracts and rollout plans to evolve APIs safely.

lessons.title: What Makes a Great User Experience
lessons.content: Understand usability, clarity, hierarchy, and delight in product design.

lessons.title: Wireframing Key Product Flows
lessons.content: Translate ideas into screens, journeys, and annotated flows.

lessons.title: Testing a Prototype With Users
lessons.content: Run practical feedback sessions and capture design improvements.

lessons.title: Finding a Brand Position That Matters
lessons.content: Map market gaps and define positioning with clarity.

lessons.title: Writing a Message Framework
lessons.content: Turn strategy into voice, pillars, and campaign-ready messaging.

lessons.title: Designing Variants and States
lessons.content: Organize variants, properties, and naming conventions in Figma.

lessons.title: Building Shared Libraries for Teams
lessons.content: Structure reusable libraries, naming systems, and design QA rituals.

lessons.title: Handoff Workflows That Engineers Love
lessons.content: Package specs, assets, and documentation for real implementation.

lessons.title: Responsive Layouts With Confidence
lessons.content: Create flexible layouts that work from mobile to desktop.

lessons.title: React Components and State Flow
lessons.content: Break interfaces into maintainable components and data boundaries.

lessons.title: Shipping UI With Quality Checks
lessons.content: Use accessibility, testing, and review practices before release.

lessons.title: Understanding Product Discovery
lessons.content: Define users, needs, and outcome-driven roadmap choices.

lessons.title: Building a Social Content Calendar
lessons.content: Turn strategy into channel-specific content that supports conversion goals.

lessons.title: Measuring Reach, Clicks, and Conversion
lessons.content: Track simple KPIs and optimize performance with campaign reviews.

lessons.title: Python Fundamentals for Data Science
lessons.content: Master Python basics: variables, loops, functions, and libraries. Learn numpy and pandas for data manipulation. Work with data structures and efficient coding practices essential for analyzing large datasets.

lessons.title: Data Cleaning and Exploration
lessons.content: Learn techniques to handle missing data, outliers, and inconsistencies. Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) with visualization. Create meaningful summaries and identify patterns in datasets.

lessons.title: Statistical Analysis and Hypothesis Testing
lessons.content: Understand probability distributions, descriptive statistics, and inferential statistics. Perform hypothesis tests, confidence intervals, and correlation analysis. Make data-driven decisions.

lessons.title: Machine Learning Algorithms Introduction
lessons.content: Introduction to supervised and unsupervised learning. Learn regression, classification, and clustering algorithms. Understand model evaluation metrics and cross-validation techniques.

lessons.title: Real-World Data Science Projects
lessons.content: Work through end-to-end projects: predict housing prices, classify customer behavior, and recommend products. Apply preprocessing, feature engineering, and model selection techniques.

lessons.title: Setting Up Your Development Environment
lessons.content: Configure Node.js, Express, and your database connection. Set up version control with Git. Initialize a project with proper folder structure and configuration files.

lessons.title: Building RESTful APIs with Express
lessons.content: Create CRUD endpoints for your resources. Implement proper HTTP methods and status codes. Add middleware for validation, error handling, and logging.

lessons.title: Authentication and Authorization
lessons.content: Implement JWT-based authentication. Create user registration and login flows. Add role-based access control (RBAC) and permission management.

lessons.title: Building with Modern CSS
lessons.content: Master CSS Grid and Flexbox for layouts. Learn CSS custom properties, animations, and transitions. Optimize CSS for performance.

lessons.title: State Management with Hooks
lessons.content: Deep dive into useState, useEffect, useContext, and custom hooks. Manage complex application state. Optimize component performance with useMemo and useCallback.

lessons.title: Mobile-First Design Principles
lessons.content: Design for small screens first. Understand touch interactions and mobile constraints. Scale designs to larger screens while maintaining usability.

lessons.title: Accessibility in UX Design
lessons.content: Create inclusive designs following WCAG guidelines. Test with screen readers and keyboard navigation. Consider users with different abilities.

lessons.title: Advanced Prototyping Techniques
lessons.content: Create interactive prototypes with animations and transitions. Test user flows before development. Gather feedback with prototype testing.

lessons.title: Visual Identity System
lessons.content: Create consistent color, typography, and imagery guidelines. Build a brand asset library. Ensure consistency across all touchpoints.

lessons.title: Product Strategy and Roadmapping
lessons.content: Define product vision and strategy. Create product roadmaps aligned with business goals. Prioritize features based on user needs and impact.

lessons.title: Requirements Gathering and Documentation
lessons.content: Conduct stakeholder interviews. Write clear user stories and acceptance criteria. Create detailed requirements documents.

lessons.title: Growing Your Social Media Audience
lessons.content: Use hashtags, timing, and engagement tactics effectively. Build community and encourage sharing. Analyze growth metrics and optimize.

assignments.title: Build a Learning Core API
assignments.description: Create the required routes and validate the API responses.

assignments.title: Draft an API Governance Checklist
assignments.description: Create a checklist for versioning, contracts, and deprecation policy.

assignments.title: Prototype a Mobile Onboarding Flow
assignments.description: Design and test a lightweight onboarding flow with clear UX decisions.

assignments.title: Write a Brand Messaging Board
assignments.description: Build brand pillars, audience statements, and sample copy.

assignments.title: Build a Shared Figma Library
assignments.description: Package buttons, forms, and navigation into a documented library.

assignments.title: Ship a Responsive Dashboard Page
assignments.description: Implement a real dashboard view with responsive layout and reusable cards.

assignments.title: Map a Quarterly Roadmap
assignments.description: Prioritize outcomes, risks, and milestones for a product quarter.

assignments.title: Plan a 2-Week Social Campaign
assignments.description: Create a campaign calendar with content types, goals, and metrics.

assignments.title: Implement Authentication Middleware
assignments.description: Build JWT-based authentication with registration and login endpoints. Include proper error handling and token refresh logic.

assignments.title: Build a Reusable Button Component Library
assignments.description: Create a React component library with button variations, states, and documentation using Storybook.

assignments.title: Conduct User Research Interview
assignments.description: Interview 3 users about their workflow. Document findings in a research report with insights and recommendations.

assignments.title: Design a Complex Form in Figma
assignments.description: Create a multi-step form design with validation states, error messaging, and success screens.

assignments.title: Create a Competitive Positioning Deck
assignments.description: Build a presentation showing market positioning, competitor analysis, and unique value propositions.

assignments.title: Write User Stories for New Feature
assignments.description: Document 5+ user stories with acceptance criteria for a proposed product feature.

assignments.title: Analyze Campaign Performance
assignments.description: Analyze a real social campaign. Calculate engagement rate, reach, and conversions. Write insights and optimization recommendations.

assignments.title: Python Data Analysis Project
assignments.description: Load a dataset, perform exploratory data analysis, and create visualizations. Write a summary of key findings.

assignments.title: Build a Predictive Machine Learning Model
assignments.description: Train a regression or classification model. Evaluate performance using appropriate metrics. Document methodology and results.

assignments.title: Design an Async Event-Driven Architecture
assignments.description: Create a detailed architecture diagram showing message queues, event streams, and service integration patterns.

course_reviews.title: Excellent Backend Course
course_reviews.content: Comprehensive coverage of Node.js and API design. The examples are practical and easy to follow.

course_reviews.title: Good but could use more projects
course_reviews.content: Very solid content! Would appreciate more real-world project examples.

course_reviews.title: Perfect introduction to UX/UI
course_reviews.content: Clear explanations, great visuals, and hands-on exercises. Highly recommended for beginners!

course_reviews.title: Solid Frontend Fundamentals
course_reviews.content: Good coverage of React and responsive design. Examples are clear and relevant.

quizzes.title: Backend Fundamentals Quiz
quizzes.description: Test your knowledge of Node.js and API design

quizzes.title: UX Principles Quiz
quizzes.description: Verify your understanding of core UX concepts

quiz_questions.question: What is REST?
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: Representational State Transfer
quiz_questions.explanation: REST stands for Representational State Transfer, an architectural style for APIs.

quiz_questions.question: What HTTP method is used to create a resource?
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: POST
quiz_questions.explanation: POST is used to create new resources on the server.

quiz_questions.question: What is the primary goal of UX design?
options: Create user satisfaction and ease of use
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: Create user satisfaction and ease of use
quiz_questions.explanation: UX design focuses on creating products that provide meaningful and relevant experiences.

quiz_questions.question: Which of the following best describes RESTful API principles?
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: Stateless, resource-based, using HTTP methods
quiz_questions.explanation: REST APIs are stateless and use HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) to operate on resources.

quiz_questions.question: What HTTP status code indicates a successful request that created a resource?
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: 201 Created
quiz_questions.explanation: 201 Created is the appropriate status code for successful resource creation.

quiz_questions.question: What does wireframing help with in the design process?
options: Planning layout and structure before detailed design
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: Planning layout and structure before detailed design
quiz_questions.explanation: Wireframes are low-fidelity sketches that help plan the layout and user flow without visual design.

quiz_questions.question: Which principle should guide accessible design?
options: Include all users regardless of ability
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: Include all users regardless of ability
quiz_questions.explanation: Accessible design ensures that products can be used by people with various abilities and disabilities.

quiz_questions.question: What does HTML stand for?
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: Hyper Text Markup Language
quiz_questions.explanation: HTML is the standard markup language for creating web pages.

quiz_questions.question: Which CSS property is used to control space inside an element?
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: padding
quiz_questions.explanation: Padding controls the space inside the element between the content and the border.

quiz_questions.question: What is the purpose of React hooks?
options: Add state and lifecycle features to functional components
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: Add state and lifecycle features to functional components
quiz_questions.explanation: React hooks like useState and useEffect allow functional components to have state and side effects.

quiz_questions.question: What does a brand positioning statement define?
options: The unique space your brand occupies in the market
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: The unique space your brand occupies in the market
quiz_questions.explanation: Brand positioning defines how your brand is perceived relative to competitors and what makes it unique.

quiz_questions.question: What is the purpose of brand messaging?
options: To communicate your brand value to audiences
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: To communicate your brand value to audiences
quiz_questions.explanation: Brand messaging communicates your unique value proposition and brand personality to target audiences.

quiz_questions.question: What is a component variant in design systems?
options: A different state or version of a component (e.g., active, disabled, loading)
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: A different state or version of a component (e.g., active, disabled, loading)
quiz_questions.explanation: Variants are different versions of a component representing different states or configurations.

quiz_questions.question: Why are shared design libraries important for teams?
options: They ensure consistency and speed up design and development
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: They ensure consistency and speed up design and development
quiz_questions.explanation: Shared libraries ensure visual consistency across products and reduce duplication of work.

quiz_questions.question: What is the first step in product management?
options: Understand the market and user needs
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: Understand the market and user needs
quiz_questions.explanation: Successful product management begins with understanding user problems and market opportunities.

quiz_questions.question: What should a product roadmap include?
options: Goals, features, timelines, and measurable outcomes
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: Goals, features, timelines, and measurable outcomes
quiz_questions.explanation: A good roadmap aligns features with business goals, timelines, and success metrics.

quiz_questions.question: What does engagement rate measure on social media?
options: How actively users interact with content
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: How actively users interact with content
quiz_questions.explanation: Engagement rate measures likes, comments, shares, and other interactions relative to reach.

quiz_questions.question: What is a content calendar used for?
options: Planning and organizing content across channels and time
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: Planning and organizing content across channels and time
quiz_questions.explanation: A content calendar helps teams plan consistent posting schedules and maintain strategy alignment.

quiz_questions.question: What does EDA (Exploratory Data Analysis) involve?
options: Investigating data structure, patterns, and anomalies
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: Investigating data structure, patterns, and anomalies
quiz_questions.explanation: EDA involves summarizing, visualizing, and understanding data before formal modeling.

quiz_questions.question: What is the purpose of data cleaning?
options: To handle missing values, outliers, and inconsistencies
quiz_questions.correctAnswer: To handle missing values, outliers, and inconsistencies
quiz_questions.explanation: Data cleaning prepares raw data for analysis by addressing quality issues.
